channel.title: Jobs on Expat Japan
channel.description: Recent content in Jobs on Expat Japan

item.title: Best Job Sites for Foreigners in Japan (2025)
item.description: The best websites and apps to find a job in Japan as a foreigner. Includes English-friendly sites, bilingual roles, and tips for each platform.

item.title: How to Change Jobs with a Work Visa in Japan (2025 Guide)
item.description: Can you change jobs on a work visa in Japan? Yes — here's exactly how to do it, what to tell immigration, and how to avoid losing your visa status.
